home.heroTitle: Collect the World. One Badge at a Time.
home.heroSubtitle: Explore real destinations, collect GPS-verified badges, climb leaderboards, win prizes, and book local guides — all in one app.
home.step1Desc: Pick from 6 stunning destinations around the world
home.step2Desc: Visit real places, snap a photo, verify with GPS
home.step3Desc: Compete with other explorers weekly, monthly, and all-time
home.step4Desc: Unlock rewards from local sponsors at milestone tiers
home.evolutionSubtitle: Collect badges to evolve Ody from a rookie Explorer to a Legendary adventurer
home.feature1Desc: Photo + location proof for every experience
home.feature2Desc: Explore destinations with pins and photos
home.feature4Desc: Unlock sponsor rewards at tier milestones
home.feature5Desc: Book local guides directly inside badge cards

operators.heroTitle: Grow Your Tourism Business with Ody Hop
operators.heroSubtitle: Reach motivated tourists at the exact moment they're looking for experiences like yours
operators.value1Desc: Your listing appears inside badge cards when tourists are physically at or near the location. They're not browsing from a couch — they're there, ready to book.
operators.value2Desc: No listing fees. You only pay a commission when a booking is confirmed and completed. No booking, no cost.
operators.value3Desc: Every tourist on Ody Hop is actively exploring, collecting badges, and competing on leaderboards. These aren't passive browsers.
operators.value4Desc: Upgrade to Featured to sort first in every badge panel, get a promoted listing badge, and stand out from other operators.
operators.step2: Select which badge locations you serve
operators.step3: Set your offers, prices, and availability
operators.step4: Tourists discover you inside badge cards
operators.step5: Confirm bookings, deliver experiences, get paid
operators.applyCta: Apply to Become a Partner Guide

apply.title: Partner Guide Application
apply.subtitle: Tell us about your tourism business
apply.successDesc: We'll review your application and get back to you within 48 hours.

about.title: About Ody Hop
